overall.description: Nighttime driving sequence in a video game (GTA V) during heavy rain. The player follows a black sedan along a wet multi-lane highway, overtakes a large red semi-truck, stops at a traffic light, and continues through an urban environment with overpasses and billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy multi-lane highway with street lighting

agents.ego_description: following a black sedan at steady speed on the wet highway, maintaining position in the right lane while a large truck travels parallel on the left

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining consistent speed
large red semi-truck driving parallel in the left lane, slightly ahead of ego vehicle

entered.detail: large red semi-trailer truck with illuminated taillights traveling in the left lane
dark-colored sedan being followed as the lead vehicle
tall street lamps illuminating the highway with warm yellow light
metal barrier running along the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving on a rain-soaked highway at night, following a black sedan while a large red semi-truck travels in the left lane. Street lights cast reflections on the wet asphalt as the vehicle maintains a steady speed through the open highway environment.

events.description: accelerates past the red semi-truck and shifts into the right lane to prepare for the intersection
approaches traffic light at intersection, slowing down as the light is red

agents.ego_description: overtaking the semi-truck on the left and merging right while approaching the traffic signal

notable_agents.action: red semi-truck falling behind as it is overtaken and left in the left lane

entered.detail: traffic light suspended over the intersection showing red
large illuminated advertisement sign visible on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle overtakes the red semi-truck and shifts into the right lane, approaching a traffic-lit intersection. The black sedan continues ahead as the truck recedes into the distance, and a red traffic light becomes visible overhead.

events.description: comes to a complete stop at the red traffic light, waiting for cross traffic to pass
traffic light changes from red to green and vehicle accelerates through the intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at the red light observing perpendicular cross traffic, then accelerating forward when the signal changes to green

notable_agents.action: cross traffic moving through the intersection perpendicular to the ego vehicle's path

entered.detail: vehicle moving through the intersection from the left side
white painted lines and crosswalk markings on the road surface

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a red traffic light with moderate cross traffic visible moving through the intersection. After the light turns green, the vehicle accelerates through the wide intersection, leaving the black sedan behind as it proceeds toward the downtown area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway corridor with multiple overpasses

events.description: enters covered area beneath concrete overpass, transitioning from open intersection to enclosed highway corridor

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through the urban highway system with multiple levels of overpasses and infrastructure

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating a covered section of road
green highway sign with white text indicating directions and exits
large brightly lit advertisement billboard on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath concrete overpasses and through the urban highway corridor, with illuminated billboards and highway signs visible. The environment transitions from the open intersection to a more enclosed space with multiple bridge levels and infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-soaked highway at night that transitions from an open road into a dense urban corridor. It begins by following a black sedan past a large red semi-truck, with street lights casting shimmering reflections across the wet asphalt. As the vehicle overtakes the truck and shifts lanes, the open highway gives way to a traffic-lit intersection where the camera comes to a brief halt. Once the light turns green, the vehicle accelerates through the intersection and leaves the sedan behind, moving toward the city center. The scene finally shifts into a more enclosed environment, passing beneath concrete overpasses and through a corridor of illuminated billboards and multi-level highway infrastructure.
